ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Image, Video, Document) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was uploaded */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the asset in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for verifying the integrity of the asset */,
  "compression" TEXT /* Compression method used, if any */,
  "refcount" INTEGER /* Reference count indicating the number of times the asset has been referenced */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the asset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the asset */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the asset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or cloud storage location of the asset */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Indicates if the asset is public or private */,
  "expires_on" TEXT /* Expiration date of the asset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_assets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, creator, viewer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client (e.g., media, education, healthcare) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission setting */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which this permission applies */,
  "can_upload" INTEGER /* Can the user upload assets? */,
  "can_download" INTEGER /* Can the user download assets? */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Can the user edit asset details? */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Can the user view assets? */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Can the user delete assets? */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Can the user share assets? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_users" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client organization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message detailing the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the log entry */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the log entry */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being acted upon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, modified, deleted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tag_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tag_links_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES asset_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tag_links_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_permissions" (
  "client_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client permission entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client organization */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to that client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_permissions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
